description: Best clean held-out perturbation signal: real JEPA identity passes, transition beats source null, retrieval improves over initial encoders, no exact-key leakage. Not promotable; Tier 1 only.
Dose split learns transition beyond source null but has elevated image/joint batch decodability and weak retrieval.
Exact split confirms transition learning but fails RNA-to-image retrieval and severe batch leakage diagnostic.
Batch-invariance penalty was too weak to remove batch-dominant joint state.
Stronger batch-invariance did not fix joint batch leakage or retrieval; stop condition fired after two families showed batch-dominant latent state.
